import React,{useRef} from 'react' import './Search.css' import {Col,Form,FormGroup} from 'reactstrap'; const Search = () => { const locationRef=useRef('') const budgetRef=useRef(0) const maxGroupRef=useRef(0) const searchHandler=()=>{ const location=locationRef.current.value const budget=budgetRef.current.value const maxGroup=maxGroupRef.current.value if(location==='' || budget==='' || maxGroup===''){ } } return (
Location
Budget
Max people
) } export default Search;
